job_summary: A Neurology CRA manages trials focused on neurological disorders such as Alzheimer’s, Parkinson’s, epilepsy, and multiple sclerosis.
key_responsibilities: Evaluate neurological assessment scales and endpoints
Ensure accurate data collection for cognitive and behavioral studies
Monitor patient safety and adverse events
work_environment: Neurology research centers, CROs, pharma companies
career_path: Neurology CRA → Senior CRA → Specialized Trial Lead
skills_required: ensure accurate data collection for cognitive and behavioral studies
evaluate neurological assessment scales and endpoints
monitor patient safety and adverse events
